title: HPOM-004: Review gate — require review record before APPROVED
description: Add validate_review.py to enforce pre-APPROVED review gate: self-review check, verdict validity, criteria rows, files listed, forbidden changes section, task ID match. Extend map_task.py approve with --review-record flag.
acceptance_criteria: validate_review.py exits 0 for well-formed review, 1 for self-review or missing fields
map_task.py approve --review-record blocks APPROVED on validate_review.py exit 1
review-record.md template includes all required HPOM header fields
